notes: Presumption applies after 5 years of credited service. If member ceased being a contributing member due to service-connected disability for 6+ months and then rejoined, the presumption for heart/lung/cancer does not apply again until re-contributing for 2 years or clear evidence of duty-connection. Presumption is part of pension/retirement system (KPERS), not standalone WC statute. Burden shifts to member or other party once employer presents contrary evidence.

Same statute covers 'policeman or fire fighter.' Presumption applies after 5 years of credited service. Re-entry restriction after service-connected disability gap of 6+ months (must re-contribute 2 years before presumption re-activates). Part of KPERS pension system.

condition_specific: disease of the lung or respiratory tract
notes: Presumption applies after 5 years of credited service. Same re-entry restriction as cardiovascular row. Part of KPERS pension system.

condition_specific: disease of the lung or respiratory tract
notes: Same statute covers 'policeman or fire fighter.' Presumption applies after 5 years of credited service. Part of KPERS pension system.

condition_specific: cancer which may result from exposure to heat, radiation, or a known carcinogen
notes: Cancer presumption limited to types that 'may, in general, result from exposure to heat, radiation, or a known carcinogen.' Same re-entry restriction applies. Part of KPERS pension system.

condition_specific: cancer which may result from exposure to heat, radiation, or a known carcinogen
notes: Same statute covers 'policeman or fire fighter.' Cancer limited to types resulting from heat, radiation, or known carcinogen exposure. Part of KPERS pension system.
